title: McCarthy Tétrault Partner Jill Yates appointed as King’s Counsel in British Columbia
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Partner Jill Yates appointed as King’s Counsel in British Columbia
Congratulations to McCarthy Tétrault partner Jill Yates on her appointment as King’s Counsel (K.C.) in British Columbia.
The King’s Counsel designation is a provincial honour that recognizes lawyers whose work strengthens the administration, accessibility and reputation of the legal system. At any time, no more than 7% of practising B.C. lawyers may hold this designation.
Nominees are rigorously evaluated by a panel of members of the judiciary, senior representatives of the Ministry of Justice and Solicitor General, and peers from the legal community. The assessment considers leadership within the profession, legal proficiency, ethical conduct, contributions to the administration of justice, community involvement, and a demonstrated commitment to advancing equality.
Jill is a leading trial lawyer and versatile litigator who handles high‑stakes and complex commercial disputes, including class actions. She serves as Regional Managing Partner for British Columbia, Chair of the National Class Actions Group and a partner in our Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group in Vancouver. She has led significant mandates across industries such as financial services, retail, real estate, technology, pharmaceuticals, forestry and manufacturing. Jill is recognized by Chambers Canada, Chambers Global, Lexpert and other major legal publications for her strategic insight, practical judgment and ability to guide clients through complex litigation. Her commitment to collaboration and innovation within the Firm, along with her contributions to professional and community organizations, reflects her role as a trusted advisor and leader in the legal community.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in all of Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its deep legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca
- Jill Yates, K.C. Managing Partner, BC Region People.Offices.Singular Vancouver
